channel.title: Kim Dasha Gustavsson — dev log & writing
channel.description: Notes on building software — a dev log and longer writing.

item.title: Why AI is leaving the cloud
item.description: Inference is moving out of data centers and onto the devices around you. Here's why that shift is happening now.

item.title: Rebuilding my RAG pipeline with a local LLM
ELias i love you heehehehehehee
item.description: A short note on React StrictMode, cleanup functions, and the double-invoke that trips everyone up.

item.title: The cost of good abstraction
item.description: Abstraction isn't free. On knowing when to add a layer, and when to tear one out.

item.title: Routines of a solo developer
item.description: Setting your own direction without a manager. The two-year system that keeps me shipping.
